Title: Add product to cart
Test Steps:
1. login via the test data credentials
2. click any product in the main dashboard
Expected Result: cart logo should add up upon products added to the cart
Actual Result: Cart Logo shows x number of products upon adding products to cart

Title: Remove product from cart
Pre-conditions:
1. Logged in via "standard_user" id
2. Products has been added to cart
Test Steps:
1. login via the test data credentials
2. click cart button on the top right
3. click the "remove" button
Expected Result:
1. product should be removed from the cart
2. cart logo should be subtracted upon removing products from the cart
Actual Result: Product are removed and the cart counter will be subtracted

Title: Checkout with product
Pre-conditions:
1. Logged in via "standard_user" id
2. Products has been added to cart
Test Steps:
1. login via the test data credentials
2. add products to cart
3. click cart button (top right)
4. click "checkout"
5. Input First Name, Last Name & zip/postal code
6. Click "Finish"
Actual Result:
Success Message : "Thank you for your order!
Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there!"

Title: Checkout with product
Pre-conditions:
1. Logged in via "standard_user" id
2. Products has been added to cart
Test Steps:
1. login via the test data credentials
2. add products to cart
3. click cart button (top right)
4. click "checkout"
5. Leave inputs empty
6. Click "Finish"
Expected Result: Error message : Fill in the inputs/missing inputs
Actual Result: Error message appeared, to fill in the input bar

Title: Checkout without product
Pre-conditions:
1. Logged in via "standard_user" id
2. "0" Product in the cart
Test Steps:
1. login via the test data credentials
2. click cart button (top right)
3. click "checkout"
4. key in " " empty space bar on all inputs.
5. Click "Finish"
Expected Result: Error message/To detect empty input , for example spacebar,dot and etc. valid numbers, minimum 5 digits and less than 10 digits
Actual Result: It by pass the user address input and went straight to payment confirmation page

Title: Checkout without product
Pre-conditions:
1. Logged in via "standard_user" id
2. "0" Product in the cart
Test Steps:
1. login via the test data credentials
2. click cart button (top right)
3. click "checkout"
Expected Result:
1.Error message/To detect empty product, to add products before checkout
2. checkout button should be disabled IF product < 0
Actual Result: It by pass the cart quantity conditon and went straight into collecting user address.
